# DigiStorms

> AI agent for onboarding emails. Analyzes your product, maps the user journey, and builds a full lifecycle email system — automatically.

## What is DigiStorms?

DigiStorms is an AI-powered SaaS tool that generates behavior-based onboarding and lifecycle email sequences. Instead of manually writing emails or guessing what to send, DigiStorms analyzes your product to understand how users reach value, then creates a complete email system tailored to your onboarding journey. It triggers messages based on real user behavior, not fixed schedules, so users get the right message at the right time.

## Who is it for?

- SaaS founders who want higher activation and free-to-paid conversion
- Growth and product teams tired of building onboarding flows manually
- Companies that know lifecycle email = revenue

## Key capabilities

- Analyzes your website to understand your product and user journey
- Generates complete onboarding email sequences (welcome, activation, milestone, upgrade, win-back)
- Triggers emails based on real user behavior, not fixed schedules
- Trained on 1,100+ real SaaS lifecycle emails from companies like Notion, Slack, Stripe, Adobe
- Includes an email library with 1,100+ B2B SaaS lifecycle email examples from 38+ top companies

## Pricing

- Free: $0/month for 100 new signups
- Pro: $19/month for 1,000 new signups
- Business: $59/month for 5,000 new signups
- Scale: $149/month for 10,000 new signups
- Concierge (done-for-you): custom pricing

## Founded by

Jonathan Bernard — lifecycle email specialist for SaaS companies.

## Email Library

The DigiStorms Email Library contains 1,051 lifecycle emails from 38 B2B SaaS companies, organized by 80 email types (tags) and 9 use case categories. Browse the full library at https://www.digistorms.ai/library

- [Adobe](https://www.digistorms.ai/library/brand/adobe) — 25 emails

## Optional

### Blog Articles

- [SaaS email benchmarks: what 1,051 lifecycle emails reveal](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-email-benchmarks) — Original research analyzing 1,051 lifecycle emails from 38 top SaaS companies. Published April 7, 2026.
- [SaaS welcome email: best practices with 28 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-welcome-email) — Best practices, timing tips, and real examples to level up your onboarding experience.
- [Product launch email: best practices with 23 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/product-launch-email) — Real examples and proven strategies to boost engagement and conversions.
- [SaaS newsletter: best practices with 15 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-newsletter) — How to craft a standout SaaS newsletter with 15 real-life examples.
- [Webinar email sequence: best practices with 25 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/webinar-email-sequence) — High-converting webinar email sequences with proven strategies.
- [Webinar follow up email: best practices with 13 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/webinar-follow-up-email) — Effective webinar follow-up emails with smart segmentation and tips.
- [Webinar emails: best practices with 20 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/webinar-emails) — Compelling webinar emails from top B2B SaaS brands.
- [Milestone emails: best practices with 12 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/milestone-emails) — How to create milestone emails that drive engagement and retention.
- [Upgrade emails: best practices with 13 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/upgrade-emails) — Upgrade emails that convert trial users into paying customers.
- [Dunning emails: best practices with 8 examples](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/dunning-emails) — Dunning emails that recover failed payments and reduce churn.
